mapper.insert:
merge into synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO a using (select #{item.tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as tableId , #{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as tableName, #{item.storeType,jdbcType=INTEGER} as storeType, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as projectName ) b on ( upper(a.TABLEID) = upper(b.tableId) and upper(a.TABLENAME) = upper(b.tableName) and a.STORE_TYPE = b.storeType and upper(a.PROJECT_NAME) = upper(b.projectName)) when matched then update set OBJECTNAME = #{item.objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLE_MOD_TIME = CURRENT_DATE,
MEMO = #{item.memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATER = #{item.creater,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATER_ID = #{item.createrId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TABLE_CREATE_TIME = to_date(#{item.tableCreateTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),
IMPORT_FLAG = #{item.importFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ISACTIVETABLE = #{item.isActiveTable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LIFECYCLE = #{item.lifeCycle,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DATAID = #{item.dataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PARTITIONCOUNT = #{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SEARCHFLAG = #{item.searchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ISPARTITION = #{item.isPartition,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PARTITIONTYPE=#{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PROJECT_NAME_CN = #{item.projectNameCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (tableInfoId, TABLEID,TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME,STORE_TYPE,PROJECT_NAME,PROJECT_NAME_CN,MEMO, CREATER,CREATER_ID,TABLE_CREATE_TIME,TABLE_MOD_TIME,IMPORT_FLAG,ISACTIVETABLE, ISPARTITION,LIFECYCLE,DATAID,SEARCHFLAG,PARTITIONTYPE,PARTITIONCOUNT ) values( #{item.tableInfoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.storeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.projectNameCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createrId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},to_date(#{item.tableCreateTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),
to_date(#{item.tableModTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),
null,
#{item.importFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.isActiveTable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isPartition,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.lifeCycle,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.dataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.searchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update:
update synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO set TABLEID = #{item.tableId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OBJECTNAME = #{item.objectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPORT_FLAG = #{item.importFlag, jdbcType=INTEGER}, ISPARTITION = #{item.isPartition, jdbcType=INTEGER},
PARTITIONTYPE = #{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
PARTITIONCOUNT = #{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LIFECYCLE = #{item.lifeCycle, jdbcType=INTEGER}, TABLE_MOD_TIME = CURRENT_DATE where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{item.tableName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{item.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(DATAID) = upper(#{item.dataId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLEINFOID) = upper(#{item.tableInfoId, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert.foreach:
merge into synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO a using (select #{item.tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as tableId , #{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as tableName, #{item.storeType,jdbcType=INTEGER} as storeType, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as projectName ) b on ( upper(a.TABLEID) = upper(b.tableId) and upper(a.TABLENAME) = upper(b.tableName) and a.STORE_TYPE = b.storeType and upper(a.PROJECT_NAME) = upper(b.projectName)) when matched then update set OBJECTNAME = #{item.objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TABLE_MOD_TIME = CURRENT_DATE,
CREATER = #{item.creater,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATER_ID = #{item.createrId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TABLE_CREATE_TIME = to_date(#{item.tableCreateTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),
ISACTIVETABLE = #{item.isActiveTable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
LIFECYCLE = #{item.lifeCycle,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DATAID = #{item.dataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PARTITIONCOUNT = #{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}
SEARCHFLAG = #{item.searchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ISPARTITION = #{item.isPartition,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PARTITIONTYPE=#{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PROJECT_NAME_CN = #{item.projectNameCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (tableInfoId, TABLEID,TABLENAME,OBJECTNAME,STORE_TYPE,PROJECT_NAME,PROJECT_NAME_CN,MEMO, CREATER,CREATER_ID,TABLE_CREATE_TIME,TABLE_MOD_TIME,IMPORT_FLAG,ISACTIVETABLE, ISPARTITION,LIFECYCLE,DATAID,SEARCHFLAG,PARTITIONTYPE,PARTITIONCOUNT ) values( #{item.tableInfoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.objectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.storeType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.projectNameCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.memo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creater,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createrId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},to_date(#{item.tableCreateTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),
to_date(#{item.tableModTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss'),
null,
#{item.importFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.isActiveTable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isPartition,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.lifeCycle,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.dataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{item.searchFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.partitionType,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.partitionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

mapper.select: select tablename as tableName, objectname as objectName, tableid as tableId from synlte.object where upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and OBJECTSTATE = 1

select distinct upper(PROJECT_NAME||'.'||TABLENAME) from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO
where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName})
select count(0) from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where STORE_TYPE = #{storeType} and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and IMPORT_FLAG = 1
mapper.update: update synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO set IMPORT_FLAG = #{importFlag} where STORE_TYPE = #{storeType} and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(dataid) = upper(#{dataId})
mapper.select: select IMPORT_FLAG from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where STORE_TYPE = #{storeType} and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{tableProject}) and upper(DATAID) = upper(#{dataId}) and rownum =1

select TABLEID as tableId, ISPARTITION as isPartition, LIFECYCLE as lifeCycle, PARTITIONTYPE as partitionType, PARTITIONCOUNT as partitionCount, IMPORT_FLAG as importFlag from synlte.object_store_info where upper(TABLEINFOID) = upper(#{tableInfoId})

select ID as id, TABLEINFOID as tableInfoId, FIELDID as fieldId, COLUMNNAME as columnName, FIELDCHINEENAME as fieldChineeName, FIELDTYPE as fieldType, FIELDLEN as fieldLen, DEFAULTVALUE as defaultValue, TABLEINDEX as tableIndex, INDEXTYPE as indexType, NEEDVALUE as needValue, RECNO as recno, PARTITION_RECNO as partitionRecno, CLUST_RECNO as clustRecno, COLUMNFIELDTYPE as columnFieldType, COLUMNFIELDLEN as columnFieldLen from synlte.object_store_fieldinfo where upper(TABLEINFOID) = upper(#{tableInfoId})
select distinct TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where upper(TABLENAME)=upper(#{tableName}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME)=upper(#{projectName}) and DATAID=#{dataId} and rownum = 1
select distinct TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where upper(TABLENAME)=upper(#{tableName}) and upper(TABLEID)=upper(#{tableId}) and DATAID=#{dataId} and rownum = 1

select TABLEINFOID as tableInfoId,TABLEID as tableId,TABLENAME as tableName,OBJECTNAME as objectName,STORE_TYPE as storeType, PROJECT_NAME as projectName,PROJECT_NAME_CN as projectNameCh,MEMO as memo,CREATER as creater,CREATER_ID as createrId, TABLE_CREATE_TIME as tableCreateTime,TABLE_MOD_TIME as tableModTime,IMPORT_FLAG as importFlag,SEARCHFLAG as searchFlag, ISPARTITION as isPartition,ISACTIVETABLE as isActiveTable,DATAID as dataId,LIFECYCLE as lifeCycle from synlte.object_store_info
select distinct tableinfoid from synlte.object_store_fieldinfo

select tableInfoId,tableName as tableNameEn,PROJECT_NAME as projectName, DATAID as resourceId from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where
upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{item.tableNameEn}) and upper(PROJECT_NAME) = upper(#{item.projectName})
and upper(DATAID) = upper(#{item.resourceId})
and upper(store_type) = upper(#{item.tableType})
mapper.delete: delete from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_FIELDINFO where upper(TABLEINFOID) = upper(#{tableInfoId})
delete synlte.object_store_fieldinfo a where a.tableinfoid not in (select tableinfoid from synlte.object_store_info)
mapper.select: select TABLEINFOID from synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO where TABLENAME=#{tableName} and rownum = 1
select TABLEID from synlte.object_store_info where dataid in (select res_id from ds_data_resource)

select value, text from (select distinct to_char(store_type) as value, 'storeType' as text from synlte.object_store_info where store_type is not null order by to_char(store_type) asc) UNION all select value, text from (select distinct project_name AS value, 'projectName' as text from synlte.object_store_info where project_name is not null order by project_name ASC) UNION ALL SELECT VALUE, TEXT FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CREATER AS VALUE, 'CREATER' as text from synlte.object_store_info where CREATER IS NOT NULL order by CREATER ASC) UNION ALL SELECT VALUE, TEXT FROM (SELECT DISTINCT dataid AS VALUE, 'dataid' as text from synlte.object_store_info where dataid IS NOT NULL order by dataid ASC)
mapper.update: update synlte.object_store_info set import_flag = #{objectStoreInfo.importFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where tableInfoId = #{objectStoreInfo.tableInfoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select distinct objectid as objectId, objectname as objectName, tablename as tableName, tableid as tableId, sjzzyjflvallue as organizationClassificationId from synlte.object where OBJECTSTATE = 1 and objectname is not null and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD'

select recno as recno, fieldid as fieldId, fieldchineename as fieldChineeName, columnname as columnName, fieldtype as fieldType, fieldlen as fieldLen, isindex as tableIndex, needvalue as needValue, defaultvalue as defaultValue, odps_pattition as odpsPattition, case when partition_recno is null then 0 else partition_recno end as partitionRecno from synlte.objectfield where objectid = #{objectId} and deleted = 0 order by recno
select count(*) as cnt from synlte.object_store_info where upper(tableid) = upper(#{tableId}) and upper(tablename) = upper(#{tableName})
mapper.update: merge into ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL a using (select 'TABLE_BUILDTABLE' as NAME, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as USERNAME ) b on (a.name = b.name and a.USERNAME = b.USERNAME) when matched then update set SHOW_FIELD_LIST = #{showField,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where NAME = 'TABLE_BUILDTABLE' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert values('TABLE_BUILDTABLE',90,#{showField,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select SHOW_FIELD_LIST from ZC_CONFIG_FIELD_CONTROL where NAME='TABLE_BUILDTABLE' and USERNAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select code_value as value, code_text as label, memo as memo from all_code_data where upper(code_id) = upper('store_type')
select sjzybsf from synlte.public_data_info where tableinfoid = #{objectStoreInfo.tableInfoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and zyzt != '2'
select count(*) from synlte.object_store_fieldinfo where tableinfoid = #{tableInfoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
